title: Status 2SLMR11B14 MR11 Reflector LED Bulb, 2 W, 100 lm
features: 25 years or 25,000 hour life. 2W - 100 Lumen brightness
Push fit GU4/GZ4 low voltage base. 12V/50Hz application
description: Status International (UK) Ltd is a family owned business based in Cleckheaton, near Bradford in West Yorkshire. With a heritage going back over 20 years, it was originally founded as a plug manufacturer based in the UK nearly 40 years ago. The company has a very clear philosophy about providing goods of the high specification and standards and has very strong links with West Yorkshire Trading Standards. Their large and diverse range includes trailing sockets, cable reels, heaters, cooling fans, small domestic appliances, electrical accessories and much more.
